full_text: Hazlewood to Williamson, Caught by Smith!! Lofted, no timing, straight to long-off. This is a good little phase for Australia. Williamson wanted to launch this full ball over long-off, but Hazlewood took pace off and Kane had to do the extra work. He tried, but he hit it to the fielder. This is a stunning innings from Kane Williamson. Surely a contender for the top innings in this comp. Australia bowled so tight in the powerplay, but he stayed calm, rode the luck and almost ensured his team got an above-par total. And the Aussies are running to Kane to applaud him. They know how special it was from Kane.

full_text: Boult to Finch, Caught by Daryl Mitchell! Boult hands New Zealand the scalp of the enemy's leader! He's done this before but missed, tries dragging one from outside off again with a pull, gets a bit of a top-edge in front of square leg, and Mitchell, the hero of the semis, runs in from the deep square leg fence to dive forward and take a phenomenal pressure catch, quite like Southee's in the 2019 World Cup final! "We haven't traveled halfway across the world to Win a semi-final" - indeed Neesh. Indeed. Mitchell doens't want his heroics to be remembered for a lost cause either. NZ look determined to give it their all to go all the way.
